description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a polished metallic head and a smooth, natural wood handle. The head is composed of a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side, designed for pulling nails. The handle is slightly curved for ergonomic grip and appears to be made from a single piece of light-colored hardwood. The metallic head is securely attached to the handle, with a visible transition between the two materials. There is a product label affixed to the side of the handle, providing branding and information. The hammer shows no visible signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments.
description: A traditional claw hammer with a polished metal head and a smooth, curved wooden handle, featuring a product label on the side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the metallic head with both the striking face and claw clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the handle and the open V-shape of the claw, with minimal detail of the striking face.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle and head, with the product label and the transition between wood and metal visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the claw's split and the end of the handle, with the head's attachment to the handle visible.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle, smooth finish, ergonomic shape, no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved, split claw for nail removal, made of polished steel.
attribute_brand_or_logo: Brand label visible on the handle, but specific brand name is not legible.
